options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -activity
options.description: Specifies the number of times the net, pin, or port switches in a clock cycle.

options.name: -bidir_port
options.description: Specifies the name of the bidirectional port.

options.name: -cell
options.description: Specifies the activity on all output pins for all instances of the specified cell.

options.name: -clock
options.description: Assigns global activity factor to all nets in domain of clock_name.

options.name: -comb_clockgate_ratio
options.description: Specifies to set the propagation ratio for combinational clock gate cell outputs.

options.name: -density
options.description: Specifies the transition density for a specific net, pin, or top-level port.

options.name: -duty
options.description: Specifies the duty cycle, if it is not specified then tool will use duty specified by the set_default_switching_activity command.

options.name: -force
options.description: pass activity info to dynamic engine without verilog netlist

options.name: -hier
options.description: Specifies a hierarchical name that an activity is being assigned to.

options.name: -icg_ratio
options.description: Specifies to set the propagation ratio for integrated clock gate (ICG) cell outputs.

options.name: -input_port
options.description: Specifies the name of the input port.

options.name: -inst
options.description: Specifies the activity on a specific instance.

options.name: -net
options.description: Specifies the name of the net.

options.name: -output_port
options.description: Specifies the name of the output port.

options.name: -period
options.description: Specifies the period that the activity is referenced to. Default: Default Frequency: The time unit is defined in the first .lib file read during design import.

options.name: -pin
options.description: Specifies the name of a pin.

options.name: -port
options.description: Specifies the name of a top-level port.

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Suppress messages.

options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all specified options back to default values.

options.name: -scale_factor
options.description: Specifies the scale transition density of net/pin/port/cell/inst/clock .

options.name: -unclocked
options.description: Applies activity (with reference period ) to all nets that doesn't have clock domain ( -unclocked).
